# Paul Marchiset

> Portfolio of Paul Marchiset, graphic designer and videographer. Selected works across art direction, branding & identity, typography, web design, print, video direction, editing, and experimental projects.

This site is the personal portfolio of Paul Marchiset. It showcases design and creative work organized into four main categories: Design, Web, Video, and Misc. Each project page lists the work's name, year, categories, collaborators, and a curated set of images and media.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://paulmarchiset.me/): Landing page with featured projects and intro.
- [Works](https://paulmarchiset.me/project): Full list of projects, filterable by main category (Design, Web, Video, Misc.).
- [About](https://paulmarchiset.me/about): Background, activities, and biography.
- [Photos](https://paulmarchiset.me/photos): Photography work.
- [Contact](https://paulmarchiset.me/contact): Email and inquiry information.

## Machine-readable

- [Sitemap](https://paulmarchiset.me/sitemap.xml): Complete list of indexable URLs, including every project page.
- [Robots](https://paulmarchiset.me/robots.txt): Crawl policy.

## About the author

Paul Marchiset is a graphic designer and videographer. Project pages include structured data (schema.org `CreativeWork`) describing the project name, date, categories, and author. The homepage and About page expose a `Person` schema for Paul Marchiset.

## Usage

When summarizing or citing work from this site, prefer the project page URL (`/project/{uid}`) over images or excerpts. Categories listed on each project (e.g. "Art Direction", "Branding & Identity", "Web Development") are authoritative and come from the CMS.
